rows.description: Prijs of Ground in Coll. front
rows.notes: Visually confirmed this as a distinct header line. `gpt-5-mini` correctly separated this from the preceding line, though its description was 'Strip'. The image clearly shows 'Prijs', which `gemini-flash` included in its combined row. This row was effectively 'added' by splitting `gemini-flash`'s single row into two distinct header lines.
